productDisplayName: Puma Men Esito Vulc Cetto Black Sports Shoes
description: Esito Vulc Cetto from puma is known for its excellent ball feel. Sleek upper and minimal overlay makes this a good casual wear shoe as well as a sportswear performer. Wear this with jeans and tonal tees. UpperSynthetic upper with synthetic and suede overlays for structure and breathabilityFormstripe on the sideCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortLace-ups for snug FitMesh innerPadded socklinerMidsoleFull-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycleOrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleBioRide technology for a more natural and responsive rideCircular nubs all over with a suction point at the big toe areaShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
